ham.subject: Transaction Alert: Payment Received on 15/04/2026
ham.body:
Dear Customer,

We would like to inform you that a payment of INR 12,500.00 has been received in your account (Account No: ****1234) on 15 April 2026 at 10:30 AM IST.

Transaction Details:
• Amount: INR 12,500.00
• Date & Time: 15/04/2026 10:30:00 IST
• Sender: ABC Enterprises
• Reference: TXN/2026/0415/ACC1234

If you did not authorize this transaction, please contact our support team immediately at support@yourbank.com or call 1800-123-456.

Thank you for banking with us.

Best Regards,
YourBank Customer Support Team

spam.subject: URGENT: CEO Request for Gift Card Purchase
spam.body:
Hi [Your Name],

I hope you are doing well. I am writing to inform you that the Board has approved a special incentive program for our top performers. As part of this initiative, I need you to purchase a gift card worth INR 5,000.00 for our upcoming client event.

Please complete the purchase within the next 24 hours and send me the receipt via email. The receipt should be sent to this address: <URL> for verification purposes.

This is a confidential request from the CEO and must be handled with utmost urgency. If you have any questions, reply to this email or call our office at 1800-987-654.

Thank you for your quick action.

Best,
S. Sharma
Chief Executive Officer
Your Company
